message:
fix(leak): cap SSH descriptor buffer to prevent unbounded growth [ft-3kxe.1]

The SSH DescriptorState VecDeque buffer had no maximum size. When the
write side couldn't keep up with reads (network congestion, slow
consumer), the buffer grew without bound. Added MAX_DESCRIPTOR_BUF_SIZE
(4 MiB) cap with backpressure — reads pause when the buffer is full
and resume after data is drained.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
